title: Apple / Google Pay Integration

description: Findability flagged as top issue for 52% of sellers.
impact: Prioritized IA/UI redesign to lift task completion and seller spend.

description: Established urgency hierarchy balancing alert prominence with workflow continuity for advertiser trust.

title: Self-Service Data Visualization
